Ntc Of Petition And Petition For Order Staying Action Between The Arbitrating Parties Only And Requiring Pltf To Arbitrate The Controversy
Off Calendar Jun-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BRIAN ANDREWS Petition for Order Staying Action Between the Arbitrating Parties Only and Requiring Plaintiff to Arbitrate the Controversy. Appearances: David W. Moyer, Esq. of Cox & Moyer (510) 522-1200 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Denise H. Greer, Esq. of Schmid & Voiles (213) 473-8754 appearing for Defendant and Moving party; J. Julia Hansen, Esq. of Hassard Bonnnington LLP (415) 288-9800 appearing for Defendant Dr. Cobbs; Cyrus A. Tabari, Esq. of Sheuerman, Martini & Tabari (408) 288-9700 Appearing thru CourtCall for Defendant California Pacific Medical. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Petition requiring plaintiff to arbitrate granted. This court action is stayed as to plaintiff and the remaining defendants. The Court adds: Discovery is allowed to proceed for the other defendants. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Brenda Fields, CSR# 7235
